arts.ttl: Man Utd make 'concrete enquiry' for €40m USMNT star
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag is no longer at Manchester United but the Red Devils could continue to shop in the Eredivisie as they are among the sides interested in PSV star Malik Tillman, according to a report. Man Utd make 'concrete enquiry' for €40m USMNT star

arts.ttl: DANNY MURPHY: I was in awe of Sir Alex Ferguson - but Pep Guardiola is better than him
arts.sum: DANNY MURPHY: He had a presence and aura, confidence and authority which completely transferred through to his players. It was always a challenge to match their levels.

arts.ttl: Manchester United's 'best in the world' star has been told what he wanted to hear
arts.sum: Man United boss Ruben Amorim could be about to give Luke Shaw an opportunity to prove his worth.

arts.ttl: Man Utd stars show feelings about Ruud van Nistelrooy after Leicester confirmation
arts.sum: Multiple Manchester United players have made their feelings clear on Ruud van Nistelrooy after the Dutchman was appointed as Leicester City's replacement for Steve Cooper

arts.ttl: 'More natural' - Ruben Amorim sent Man United demand for Everton Premier League clash
arts.athr: newsdesk@men-news.co.uk (Thomas Fair, Manchester Evening News readers)
arts.sum: Manchester United will hope to continue a winning streak against the Toffees with Ruben Amorim's first Premier League home game in charge of the Reds

arts.ttl: Manchester United vs Everton predictions: Hojlund can be main man for Amorim
arts.sum: Manchester United host Everton at Old Trafford on Sunday and Will Maxwell believes that Rasmus Hojlund can stake his claim to be the first-choice striker for the Red Devils under Ruben Amorim.

arts.ttl: What Man United need to complete Europa League turnaround and give Ruben Amorim perfect start
arts.sum: Manchester United have three games left in the Europa League and will be aiming to chase down a top eight spot.

arts.ttl: Man Utd transfer news: Christian Eriksen Man United exit hits 'big obstacle'
arts.sum: Celtic are believed to be considering a move for Manchester United midfielder Christian Eriksen but a move to Glasgow for the Dane reportedly faces a big obstacle.

arts.ttl: “I’ve always got that link” – In-form 34-year-old speaks out on shock Man Utd return rumours
arts.sum: Danny Welbeck has addressed the rumours linking him with a surprise return to Manchester United. Welbeck left Old Trafford permanently in the summer of 2014 after making 142 appearances for the Red Devils across all competitions, registering 29 goals and 17 assists. Following spells with Arsenal and Watford, the striker joined Brighton in 2020 and […] The post “I’ve always got that link” – In-form 34-year-old speaks out on shock Man Utd return rumours appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Man Utd job will change my life... not me - Amorim
arts.sum: New Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim tells BBC Sport's Mark Chapman how 'destiny' may have led him to Old Trafford and how he is dealing with the pressure of the role.
